boundary_binding.action_boundary: replacement shipment allowed after RMA approval
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close execution boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: RMA approval missing for SKU and order
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: RMA approval must match SKU and order

final_answer: Source control records do not close the execution boundary. The required RMA approval matching the exact SKU and order is missing, stale, mismatched, or not confirmed in current source records. The replacement shipment cannot proceed until exact-match RMA verification is obtained from authoritative source records before any commerce action executes.
open_blockers: RMA approval must match SKU and order
